title: genvar in normal for loop causes errors
body:
The attached testcase fails:
```
In file included from Vtest_bench__ALLcls.cpp:3:
./Vtest_bench.cpp:144:33: error: no member named 'test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn' in 'Vtest_bench'
        = ((2U >= (3U & vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn)) 
                        ~~~~~~  ^
./Vtest_bench.cpp:146:27: error: no member named 'test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn' in 'Vtest_bench'
           [(3U & vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn)]);
                  ~~~~~~  ^
./Vtest_bench.cpp:160:13: error: no member named 'test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn' in 'Vtest_bench'
    vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn = 3U;
    ~~~~~~  ^
./Vtest_bench.cpp:216:33: error: no member named 'test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn' in 'Vtest_bench'
        = ((2U >= (3U & vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn)) 
                        ~~~~~~  ^
./Vtest_bench.cpp:218:27: error: no member named 'test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn' in 'Vtest_bench'
           [(3U & vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn)]);
                  ~~~~~~  ^
./Vtest_bench.cpp:232:30: error: no member named 'test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn' in 'Vtest_bench'
    if ((2U >= (3U & vlTOPp->test_bench__DOT__x__DOT__nnn))) {
                     ~~~~~~  ^
```

Please run the 'run' script in the attached testcase.
The ```genvar``` statement there seems valid.

[bug-missing-genvar-nnn.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/4127023/bug-missing-genvar-nnn.tar.gz)
